reviews.text:
Andy and Abbi were so much fun to work with our wedding. We know that we did not have a typical wedding for their style of photo shoots, as we were on a farm versus in the mountains frolicking, but they really made our day special. Abbi was incredibly friendly and easy to work with, which made getting candid a piece of cake. Abbi and Andy gave great feedback during one on one photos during our couple photos, as well as making us laugh, which made the whole experience so enjoyable. Even though it wasn’t their main job, every single person at the wedding said they were a delight. It’s very easy to see how much fun they have shooting photos of people having the best day of their life. Oh, and let’s not forget how quickly they got those photos back to us. Truly, we didn’t want to wait any longer, and they got them back way earlier than expected.

Highly recommend Abbi and Andy for your photos, and we cannot wait to take anniversary photos in the mountains with them

We cannot say enough amazing things about Andy and Abbi! From our very first conversation, they were an absolute dream to work with by their warm, professional, and genuinely excited to capture our day. They instantly put us at ease and made the entire process effortless. There was no overwhelming checklist or forced posing; we gave them the key details, and they handled everything flawlessly.

On the wedding day, they arrived on time, stayed organized, and somehow managed to keep us perfectly on schedule without ever making it feel rushed. They have such a calming and confident presence, which made the day flow so smoothly. We were a little nervous about being in front of the camera, but they made it feel so natural that we forgot they were even there. Yet, when we saw our photos, it was as if they had been everywhere all at once..capturing every beautiful, emotional, and candid moment!

The photos themselves blew us away. They perfectly reflected the energy and emotion of the day...crisp, colorful, and full of life! We have so many favorites that we still can’t choose which ones to frame! To top it off, we received our full gallery much sooner than expected, which was the best surprise.

We really wanted to work with a local team who knew the area and could capture its beauty authentically, and choosing Andy and Abbi was the best decision we could have made. Their talent, professionalism, easy-going nature, and passion truly shine through in every single photo. We’re forever grateful for the memories they captured. Much love to you both in your future, you two are incredible!

Andy and Abbi are not only incredible photographers but also incredible people to work with! They were punctual and professional yet easy to talk to and be around. My husband and I both had fairly large wedding parties and they managed to capture the essence of every person.They took tons of hilarious candid photos of everyone we love which was exactly what I asked for and they also had great direction for the posed photos which was huge because I always feel awkward with those things. Suuuuper recommended these guys for your own special photos!

I’m still in awe of how beautifully our wedding photos turned out! Abbi is an incredibly talented photographer who captured every moment of our intimate outdoor celebration in Durango, Colorado with such heart and artistry. I had dreamed of having candid shots of our family-style dinner, and she went above and beyond. Choosing Abbi as our wedding photographer was one of the best decisions we made—I’m endlessly grateful.

Andy and Abbi came highly recommended to us from close friends in which they captured stunning photos of their engagement and wedding. We were thrilled to find out they would travel to a small town in Baja California for our destination wedding.  We had a multi site shoot spanning 2 days that they executed flawlessly.

It was important to us that they captured not only the quintessential wedding moments but also our ridiculous antics. For example using my husband as a surfboard at the beach shoot and cannon balling into a pool to kick off the after after party. Vibe check passed!  The connection and ease we found with Andy and Abbi shows through in the final product.

On a practical note, they were communicative and punctual through the entire process. Their professionalism was greatly appreciated and put us at ease during our special day.

We started the day with photos at Serendipity a boutique hotel we stayed out during the wedding weekend.  Followed by our wedding and reception held at Rancho Corazon an amazing space nestled in a palm grove. They utilized the entire space from the pool, palm grove, vintage car, and reception space perfectly. Last location was sunset on the beach the following day. They captured every wonderful moment everywhere we were and also so fun to be around!

I can’t express how amazing our photos turned out and how they bring a smile to our faces every time we look at them. Andy and Abbi are true masters of their craft! We will treasure these photos forever!

Thank you, Andy and Abbi!
